name: dna-inheritance-simple
description: Test simple DNA inheritance functionality with basic inheritance and override behavior
author: MCP Test Framework
descriptionLong: This test validates the basic DNA inheritance system functionality including user DNA override, project DNA inheritance, and explicit parameter override behavior.
objectives: Verify that DNA inheritance works correctly with simple configurations
Test that user DNA properly overrides project DNA
Test that project DNA properly inherits from system defaults
Test explicit parameters override DNA inheritance
Verify DNA merge behavior with partial overrides

steps.name: Setup: Create user DNA file
steps.check: User DNA file is created with correct content

steps.name: Setup: Create project DNA file
steps.check: Project DNA file is created with correct content

steps.name: Test: Load user DNA
steps.expected: User DNA loaded with version 1 and correct company name

steps.name: Test: Load project DNA
steps.expected: Project DNA loaded with version 1 and correct company name

steps.name: Test: Merge DNA levels (user > project)
steps.check: DNA levels are merged with correct priority
steps.expected: Merged DNA has user values for overridden fields, project values for un-overridden fields

steps.name: Test: Verify inheritance priority
steps.check: User DNA properly overrides project DNA for all fields
steps.expected: All user-specified values take precedence over project values

steps.name: Test: Partial override behavior
steps.check: Un-overridden project DNA values are preserved
steps.expected: Project values are preserved where user did not override
